subcodes.title: Du’a’ath-Thalith fi Ardi’l’A’la li-Karbala’I fath-‘Ali
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I and all things bear witness that verily Thou art God. Thine are creation and command, both in times past and times to come. Thou hast ever been one God, Single, Eternal, Self-Subsisting, Living, Self-Sustaining [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم لاشهدنک و کل شیء علی انک انت الله لک الخلق و الامر من قبل و من بعد لم تزل کنت الها واحدا احدا صمدا فردا حیا قیوما
subcodes.subjects: @creation of the world, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @purpose; goal of creation
